response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems expertise, but he lacks the executive leadership experience required for a CTO role. There is no evidence on his resume of scaling engineering organizations, managing external delivery partners, or architecting production-grade multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes fintech environments.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed systems expertise, including handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at re:cinq.
Demonstrated architectural ability and entrepreneurial drive as the Founder of an event-driven platform (GISCollective).
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people.
No demonstrated experience architecting complex, algorithmic fintech systems like credit risk or working capital management.
AI experience appears limited to recent developer tooling rather than operating stateful multi-agent systems in high-stakes commercial environments.
